_comment: Match rules for dim_company. Merges Salesforce Account + NetSuite Customer into one canonical company record.

blocking._comment: Pre-partition by email domain before pairwise comparison. Reduces O(n²) to O(b·k²).

rules._comment: Rule 1 — Deterministic: identical normalised email address = same company billing contact → same company.
Rule 2 — Probabilistic: company name similarity + same country. Catches name variants like 'Acme Corp' vs 'ACME Corporation'.
